metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_50
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Increased average peak quantal release per synapse in rab3a KO neurons treated with either MK-801 or AP5 and enhanced paired-pulse facilitation in these neurons indicate a higher quantal release per synapse (i.e. more synaptic vesicles fuse per synapse) during stimulation.

19/01/2017 Pim
This annotation build s on well established information that rab3a is a protein attached to the SV membrane.. Experimental description: "Low-density microisland cultures of hippocampal pyramidal neurons were prepared from E15-E17 wild-type, rab3A-mutant and synaptotagmin I mutant mouse embryos as described."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
